creator: freebsd@skysmurf.nl
text:
Created attachment 143401
Makefile patch

x11-fonts/ttmkfdir is orphaned and I volunteer to adopt it.

The port has already been stagified.
The port has been checked with Portlint.
Mirrors have been verified.

The attached patch:
* updates MAINTAINER
* adds new maintainer's mirror to MASTER_SITES
* eliminates "deprecated" use of MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR
* adds specification of LICENSE
* removes erroneous "x11" entry in CATEGORIES

Remaining issues:
* The site pointed to by WWW is just an empty page. I'll keep an eye on that.
